name: Tufted Grid Shower Curtain Tan - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Refresh your bathroom decor with the textured style of this Tufted Grid Shower Curtain from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This decorative shower curtain features a tonal tufted grid pattern against a tan-color backdrop for timeless appeal. Made from 100% cotton, it has a buttonhole top for easy installation and is machine washable for convenient cleaning.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
